not_a_verdict: Repair record. SUBMITTED for independent verification (author != subject).

smallest_confirmed_failing_component_fix.change: Added provenance-aware classification: RUNNING_CONFIRMED now requires FRESH ORGANIC evidence. Repair/replay/manual completions classify as DEGRADED_REPAIR_SUSTAINED / COMPLETION_UNPROVEN and route to organic_producer_reconcile_escalation (NOT receipt-writer repair, which was the masking loop). Backward compatible (14/14 legacy fixtures green).
smallest_confirmed_failing_component_fix.wiring: scripts/autorun_status_v1.py now fetches a 50-row window and passes organic/repair provenance into classify_loop_state (organic-only liveness).

organic_producer_restart.why: The dead component is the cloud http_loop loop-execution worker (Railway noos-loop-runner). Restart/redeploy needs cloud deploy credentials that are objectively not present on this host (no fly/supabase/psql CLI, no cloud cred env vars; secrets live outside the repo in ~/.noetfield-platform-secrets/).

organic_producer_restart.safety: No broad platform restart. The isolated producer is the only target. Integrator-repair keeps cockpit evidence surfaced (now correctly labelled DEGRADED_REPAIR_SUSTAINED, not RUNNING_CONFIRMED) in the interim.
